message:
hardening(frankenterm-core): overflow-safe deadlines + panic-free Mux access + cross-module cleanup

Coordinated hardening pass across 32 files in crates/frankenterm-core.
The unifying themes are: (1) defensive overflow protection on Instant /
Duration arithmetic, (2) extracting helpers so the same pattern isn't
re-implemented in five places, and (3) tightening the contract of
several internal modules.

Notable changes:

  * lock_orchestration: introduce `duration_ms_saturating` and
    `deadline_after_ms` helpers; replace open-coded
    `now_ms.saturating_add(u64::try_from(...).unwrap_or(u64::MAX))`
    sites with calls to them. Also adds `mark_handoff_rolled_back`
    helper that consolidates the offered → rolled-back state guard
    into one place.
  * snapshot_engine: `Instant::now() + fallback_interval` could panic
    on extremely large intervals; replaced with
    `Instant::now().checked_add(fallback_interval)` and a
    `next_periodic_fallback_at` closure that warns if the deadline
    can't be scheduled. Wait paths now degrade gracefully to a
    250ms poll instead of panicking.
  * runtime, runtime_compat, ipc, restart_scheduler, network_observer:
    similar Instant arithmetic hardening.
  * mcp / mcp_error / mcp_helpers / mcp_tools: error mapping cleanup
    and a bumped conformance-rules test.
  * connector_inbound_bridge / connector_outbound_bridge / search_bridge
    / subprocess_bridge / suggestions / tantivy_ingest: signature
    cleanups so callers no longer have to re-construct mux handles
    they already own.
  * cx, events, intervention_console, policy, session_resume, storage,
    tx_execution, wait, web/sse, wezterm, vendored/mux_client: smaller
    consistency tweaks tied into the same sweep.
  * workflows/builtin_workflows, workflows/runner, workflows/wait_execution:
    overflow-safe wait scheduling and clearer error wrapping.
  * tests/mcp_conformance_rules_test.rs: updated to match new error
    surface.

Cargo.lock updated to track resolution after the touched dependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -11838,6 +11838,7 @@ dependencies = [
 name = "wezterm-open-url"
 version = "0.1.0"
 dependencies = [
+ "log",
  "proptest",
  "winapi",
 ]
